notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with proper physics, multi-level progression, lives, scoring, hi-score persistence, and audio; minor visual simplicity (no brick highlights/gradients) but fully functional and playable.
An exceptionally well-crafted, flawless implementation of Breakout with perfect collision logic, audio synthesis, and polished game states.
A solid and mostly complete Breakout clone, but collision handling and some state/input choices keep it short of a polished benchmark-perfect build.
